scenarios.idealSpecificInput: Generate a test plan for the config reader refactor in src/cli/config/reader.ts. Changed validation logic and added userRole parsing. Existing tests in test/config/ cover basic loading.
Write tests for the dashboard preset system in src/dashboard/presets.js. No existing tests. High risk: guided presets construct prompts from user input.
Test the webhook retry logic in src/api/webhooks.ts — changed from 3 to 5 retries with exponential backoff. Risk: failed deliveries could be lost.
